stories.title: Add /api/v1/ route aliases in registry.ts
stories.description: Per ADR-0018 Phase 1: add route aliases so all /api/* endpoints are also accessible at /api/v1/*. In src/worker/routes/registry.ts, after registering all OpenAPI routes, add a wildcard that rewrites /api/v1/* to /api/*. Add 2 tests verifying /api/v1/health and /api/v1/alerts work identically to their unversioned counterparts.

stories.title: Add remaining 5 migration rollback scripts
stories.description: Only 3/8 rollback scripts created in S-402. Create the remaining .down.sql files for migrations in migrations/. Read each migration, write reverse SQL. Skip files that already have .down.sql.
stories.notes: All 5/5 migrations have valid .down.sql (PRD claimed 8 migrations but only 5 exist — all already had rollbacks)

stories.title: Add try/catch to report.ts and blog.ts handlers
stories.description: Add explicit try/catch to remaining uncovered handlers: src/worker/routes/report.ts and src/worker/routes/blog.ts. Follow pattern from telegram.ts: catch, structuredLog('error',...), return c.json({error:{code:'INTERNAL_ERROR',...}}, 500). Do NOT modify handlers that already have try/catch.
acceptance_criteria: report.ts and blog.ts handlers have try/catch

stories.title: Add latency budget JSDoc and wire remaining DI factory callers
stories.description: Two small tasks: (1) Add /** @latency <tier> (<budget>) */ JSDoc to each route handler in registry.ts. Tiers per ADR-0019: fast=50ms (health, counter, feed, badges, stats), medium=200ms (reports, vote, newsletter, digest), slow=5000ms (check, check-image, check-qr), external=10000ms (telegram, whatsapp), ssr=500ms (blog, alerts, og, card). (2) Grep for direct sanityFetch/sendAlert/analyzeDomain calls that should use createSanityClient/createAlerter/createDomainIntel factories instead. Update them.
acceptance_criteria: Direct callers updated to use DI factories
stories.last_error: TIMEOUT — agent did not complete within 300s. Retry with longer timeout.
